rounds.pro_tip: Natural imperfections like lens flare, slight blur, or uneven lighting are hallmarks of a real photograph.
Look for natural imperfections — real photos have dust, slight blur, and uneven lighting.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a rustic wooden workshop wall with a variety of well-used hand tools, including hammers, wrenches, and screwdrivers, hanging haphazardly on hooks. Shot with a Canon EOS R5, f/4.0, ISO 200, 50mm lens, capturing the soft, diffused natural light streaming in from a nearby window, highlighting the dust motes and worn textures.

rounds.pro_tip: Natural imperfections like lens flare, slight blur, or uneven lighting are hallmarks of a real photograph.
Check for symmetry — AI tends to make things too perfect and symmetrical.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a premium black and silver hand tool set, including ratchets, sockets, and extension bars, artfully arranged in a flat lay composition on a sleek, dark grey textured surface. Captured with a Phase One XF IQ4, f/11, ISO 50, 70mm lens, utilizing softbox studio lighting from above and side fill lights to enhance the metallic sheen and deep black finishes, creating a professional product photography aesthetic.

rounds.pro_tip: Examine text and labels — AI struggles with readable, consistent lettering.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of a meticulously well-organized array of gleaming metal and plastic tools on a light grey pegboard wall in a modern carpentry workshop. Hammers, saws, drills, and measuring tapes are perfectly aligned, showcasing a vibrant display ready for DIY projects. Captured with a Nikon Z7 II, f/8.0, ISO 100, 35mm lens, using studio strobe lighting to achieve even illumination and deep depth of field across the entire wall.

rounds.attribution: Photo by cottonbro studio on Pexels
rounds.pro_tip: Natural imperfections like lens flare, slight blur, or uneven lighting are hallmarks of a real photograph.
Check edges carefully — AI often produces halos or unnatural blending where objects meet.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of an assorted collection of colorful handheld tools, like pliers, cutters, and small screwdrivers, neatly organized in a bright red plastic tool rack on a workbench. Shot with a Sony Alpha 7 IV, f/5.6, ISO 400, 85mm lens, under crisp, even LED workshop lighting, providing sharp detail and no harsh shadows, at an eye-level perspective.

rounds.attribution: Photo by Elena Mozhvilo on Unsplash
rounds.pro_tip: Natural imperfections like lens flare, slight blur, or uneven lighting are hallmarks of a real photograph.
Look at reflections — real reflections match the environment, AI reflections are often random.
rounds._note: Prompt: A photorealistic photograph of an extreme close-up of various pristine, polished silver surgical instruments, including scalpels, forceps, and clamps, meticulously laid out on a vibrant blue sterile surgical sheet. Shot with a macro lens on a Fujifilm GFX 100S, f/2.8, ISO 200, 100mm macro lens, under bright, focused operating room lights, creating a shallow depth of field that highlights the intricate details and reflective surfaces of the instruments against the soft texture of the sheet.
